design_philosophy: Clean light minimalist Nordic Scandinavian design. Generous white space, warm earthy/neutral palettes, highly readable sans-serif typography, high-performance layouts, conveying trust and technical expertise. 'Hygge' functionality.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#111827]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#111827]

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 sm:gap-8

components.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80), clear logo, nav links (hidden on mobile, replaced with hamburger), primary CTA button.
components.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large bold heading, two CTAs. Subtle background texture or off-white background with a striking professional image of an electrician.
components.services_grid: Cardless or subtle 1px border cards (border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white). Hover effect: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg. Icons using lucide-react (stroke-width 1.5).
components.about_section: Two-column layout (image + text) with ample padding. Organic or rounded rectangle image framing.
components.process_section: Vertical timeline or 4-column horizontal steps. Use clear numerals and minimal icons.
components.why_choose_us: List or grid format highlighting 5 USPs with check-circle icons.
components.contact_form: Shadcn UI forms, clean inputs (border-b only or rounded-md with soft borders), solid primary CTA button.
components.footer: Dark background (primary color #0F172A) with white/light gray text for high contrast. Simple links, contact info, service area.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow. Links underline animation.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (framer-motion or simple CSS) for sections as they enter viewport.

icons.style: Minimalist, stroke-width: 1.5, color: primary (#0F172A) or secondary (#F59E0B)

hero_image.description: Technician working on circuit breaker panel, adjusting electrical wires indoors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts to achieve the organic/asymmetrical Nordic design. Use Shadcn components for interactive parts (Contact form).
Ensure all text is in Swedish as per the problem statement.
Implement a sticky navigation with glassmorphism.
Use generous padding (e.g. py-24) to create breathing room characteristic of Scandinavian design.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing.
Avoid using Inter font for headings. Use Outfit or Manrope.
Render the 12 services in a responsive bento-like grid using Lucide icons.
The 12 services to include: Elcentral, Eluttag, Felsökning av el, Laddbox, Renovering av elnät, Smarta hem, Solpaneler, Spishäll, Strömbrytare, Styrteknik, Taklampa, Vitvaror.
Process section should clearly display the 4 steps: Kontakt, Inspektion & offert, Installation, Kontroll & färdigställande.
Why Choose Us section: 5 USPs: Certifierade elektriker, Snabb service, Transparent prissättning, Hög säkerhetsstandard, Moderna lösningar.
